message: Mission start: Scan zones for survivors.

thought:
The drones have been assigned to the scanning zone. Drone_1, Drone_2, and Drone_3 will start covering Zone A simultaneously. 

Next, I will wait for the drones to start their scans and begin their coverage of the zone. Once a drone's battery level drops below 25%, I will recall it for charging. After that, I will redistribute any idle drones to zones that need coverage.

I will now end my turn and wait for the next notification.

The mission status still indicates that Zone e7c6b8 is scanning at 63.6% coverage, and no new survivors have been found. All drones are idle and assigned to Zone e7c6b8.

Since Zone e7c6b8 is not yet at 100% coverage, we will continue to monitor the status and redistribute the drones as needed. Let's use the auto_assign_fleet() tool to redistribute the drones again, ensuring that they are evenly distributed across the zones that need coverage.

Redistributing the fleet to cover any remaining zones.
